languages.text: "Как изменилась ваша жизнь после возвращения в лоно Империума?"

languages.text: "How has your life changed since your return to the fold of the Imperium?"
languages.original_text: "Как изменилась ваша жизнь после возвращения в лоно Империума?"

traits.locale_text: "How has your life changed since your return to the fold of the Imperium?"

languages.text: “自打重返帝国怀抱之后，你的生活有什么变化？”
languages.original_text: "How has your life changed since your return to the fold of the Imperium?"

traits.locale_text: “自打重返帝国怀抱之后，你的生活有什么变化？”

languages.text: "İmparatorluk'un saflarına döndüğünden beri hayatın nasıl değişti?"
languages.original_text: "How has your life changed since your return to the fold of the Imperium?"

traits.locale_text: "İmparatorluk'un saflarına döndüğünden beri hayatın nasıl değişti?"

languages.text: « De quelle manière votre vie a-t-elle changé depuis que vous avez rejoint l'Imperium ? »
languages.original_text: "How has your life changed since your return to the fold of the Imperium?"

traits.locale_text: « De quelle manière votre vie a-t-elle changé depuis que vous avez rejoint l'Imperium ? »

languages.text: «¿De qué formas ha cambiado su vida desde su regreso al Imperium?».
languages.original_text: "How has your life changed since your return to the fold of the Imperium?"

traits.locale_text: «¿De qué formas ha cambiado su vida desde su regreso al Imperium?».

languages.text: "Wie hat sich Euer Leben verändert, seit Ihr in den Schoß des Imperiums zurückgekehrt seid?"
languages.original_text: "How has your life changed since your return to the fold of the Imperium?"

traits.locale_text: "Wie hat sich Euer Leben verändert, seit Ihr in den Schoß des Imperiums zurückgekehrt seid?"

languages.text: 「帝国に帰還して以来、あなたの生活はどのように変わりましたか？」
languages.original_text: "How has your life changed since your return to the fold of the Imperium?"

traits.locale_text: 「帝国に帰還して以来、あなたの生活はどのように変わりましたか？」
